text.title: Nomad Low-Energy Mode Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

list.pattern: allowed_tasks empty OR length > 5 — violates r2
expected_return missing OR < activation_date — violates r5

example.code: { "artefact_id": "low-energy-mode-2026-w22", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "activation_date": "2026-05-25", "expected_return": "2026-06-08", "allowed_tasks": [ "async-standup-read", "contractor-block-escalation", "customer-emergency-reply" ], "auto_reply_text": "Limited availability until June 8; for emergencies contact @co-founder; daily check-in by 18:00 UTC.", "escalation_contact": "@co-founder", "owner": "@ruslan" }
example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
Invalid — required fields missing or forbidden patterns matched (e.g. owner=='team').
